message:
fix(readme): correct screenshot captions to match actual content

Fixed incorrect captions that were guessed from filenames instead of
viewing the actual images:

1. lambda_phage_full_interface.webp
   - Was: "3D structure viewer, sequence grid, gene annotations"
   - Now: "Main dashboard with phage selector, Lambda illustration,
     sequence grid, 3D viewer, and Analysis Tools panel"

2. t5_phage_3d_structure.webp
   - Was: "WebGL 3D protein structure in cartoon mode"
   - Now: "Color-coded amino acid grid with gene map, alongside
     WebGL 3D structure (8ZVI, 28,618 atoms) from RCSB PDB"

3. t5_phage_sequence_detail.webp
   - Was: "Color-coded nucleotides with amino acid translation"
   - Now: "Virtual Gel Electrophoresis [Alt+G] - restriction enzyme
     digestion simulation with EcoRI, HindIII, BamHI, etc."

4. t5_phage_zoomed_view.webp
   - Was: "Zoomed sequence grid with individual nucleotides"
   - Now: "Simulation Hub [Shift+S] - interactive phage biology
     simulations including Lysogeny Decision Circuit, Plaque Growth
     Automata, Ribosome Traffic Simulator, Burst Kinetics, etc."

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,27 +16,27 @@ curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/phage_explorer/m ## Screenshots

- +
- Lambda phage (λ) — Full desktop interface showing the 3D protein structure viewer, color-coded sequence grid with gene annotations, and navigation controls + Main dashboard — Phage selector with 24 genomes, Lambda phage illustration, color-coded sequence grid, 3D protein structure viewer, and Analysis Tools panel

- +
- T5 phage — WebGL-rendered 3D protein structure with cartoon rendering mode; structures fetched from RCSB PDB in real-time + Sequence + Structure view — Color-coded amino acid grid with gene map, alongside WebGL 3D protein structure (8ZVI, 28,618 atoms) fetched from RCSB PDB

- +
- Sequence detail view — Color-coded nucleotides (A/T/G/C) with amino acid translation; toggle reading frames with F key + Virtual Gel Electrophoresis [Alt+G] — Simulate restriction enzyme digestion with EcoRI, HindIII, BamHI and more; compare predicted band patterns against experimental gels

- +
- Zoomed sequence grid — Individual nucleotides with position markers; smooth 60fps scrolling for genomes up to 500kb+ + Simulation Hub [Shift+S] — Interactive phage biology simulations: Lysogeny Decision Circuit, Plaque Growth Automata, Ribosome Traffic, Burst Kinetics, and more

---
